mapper.select: SELECT A.ID, B.DICT_VALUE WORK_SCHEDULE_CODE, B.DICT_LABEL WORK_SCHEDULE_LABEL, A.START_DAY_TYPE, A.START_TIME, A.END_DAY_TYPE, A.END_TIME FROM M_DICT_DATA B LEFT JOIN M_WORK_SCHEDULE A ON B.DICT_VALUE = A.WORK_SCHEDULE_CODE WHERE B.DICT_TYPE = 'WORK_SCHEDULE' ORDER BY B.SORT_NUM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_work_schedule( ID, WORK_SCHEDULE_CODE, START_DAY_TYPE, START_TIME, END_DAY_TYPE, END_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id}, #{workScheduleCode}, #{startDayType}, #{startTime}, #{endDayType}, #{endTime}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )
